name: Potluck Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the eggplant into 1/2-inch cubes. There should be about 1 cup of sliced pimento stuffed olives in place of the remaining cheese.
2. Heat the oven to 350 degrees F. Cook the macaroni as directed on the package and drain.
3. While the macaroni is cooking, cook and stir the meat and onion in a Dutch oven until the meat is brown. Drain off the excess fat.
4. Stir in the salt, Italian seasoning, pepper, macaroni, eggplant, sour cream, pimento, and 1 cup of the cheese into the cooked macaroni.
5. Turn the mixture into an ungreased 3-quart casserole.
6. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
7. Bake uncovered until the eggplant is tender, about 45 to 50 minutes.
8. Serve hot.
